_comment: Stage 9e Miters survey: L-shape with the canonical reflex edge (vertical edge connecting (0,0,+0.5) and (0,0,-0.5) at the L's concave corner). Interior dihedral on the bulk side is 270°; the standard offset_meet would slide BoundVerts INTO the missing space (away from the bulk). Tests how vibe3d handles this without dedicated miter logic.
